name: blog_or_content_page_10_pages_fit-guide

observed_strengths.observation: Dedicated fit guide at /pages/fit-guide — H1 'Find Your Fit' with meta 'Every product on our site features a fit profile that indicates things like length, looseness and stretch'; for apparel, fit uncertainty is the #1 reason for cart abandonment and returns, and a proactive fit guide directly addresses this

Meta targets 'fit profile' as a differentiator — the fit guide frames tentree's sizing system as a proprietary tool ('fit profile' with length, looseness, stretch attributes), creating a discoverable tool for size-anxious first-time buyers

missing_or_weak.observation: Fit guide has only a single H1 heading — no H2 sub-sections visible ('Relaxed Fit', 'Slim Fit', 'Regular Fit' categories) in the crawled heading structure; the guide may be image-based with limited crawlable text, reducing SEO value for 'tentree size guide' or 'sustainable clothes sizing' queries

No product CTAs linked from the fit guide — after a buyer determines their fit profile, there's no 'Shop Relaxed Fit' or 'Browse Slim Fit' link in the heading structure to direct them to relevant products; the guide answers the question but doesn't close the conversion
OG title and OG description empty — same sitewide gap

purchase_path_notes: Fit guide is a smart CRO asset for apparel — reduces size-driven abandonment. The conversion gap is that no product links follow the fit advice. Adding 'Shop [fit type]' CTAs after each fit category would convert the guide's problem-solving engagement into add-to-cart intent.
